heroHeadline: Hamas-Led October 7 Attack: 1,195 Killed, 251 Taken Hostage — All Resolved
heroSubtitle: The deadliest attack on Jewish people since the Holocaust — assault timeline, hostage crisis resolved Jan 2026, intelligence failures, and IDF response
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Israel Police, UN OCHA, Israeli government, Reuters, AP, Haaretz, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are official Israeli counts; Hamas-theater figures are separately noted and contested. All 251 hostages accounted for as of January 26, 2026.
